title: ilex cuthbertii
intro: Ilex cuthbertii is a species of holly native to New Zealand, characterized by its glossy, dark green leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of ursolic acid. The health benefits of Ilex cuthbertii are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy among locals. Herbal preparations of Ilex cuthbertii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
